title: Yuuzhandroid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Yuuzhandroids''' were droids built by [[Tendrando Arms]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] for training their [[YVH 1]] droids. Similar to the YVH 1s, they resembled [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warriors and were equipped with sensor packages that mimicked their odor, tactics, body heat, and heartbeats.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''

[[Category:YVH-series battle droid models]]
